10225076.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1700_3
10225076.transcript: I know you're made of steel or whatever, but fall back already!

38131741.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_throw_dispel_reaction_2
38131741.transcript: You're not going to like this.

38187637.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
38187637.transcript: You're scary when you act cute.

63084582.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
63084582.transcript: I'm not going to get cursed if I kill something here, right?

69398744.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
69398744.transcript: Know what melts ice? Fire, baby!

69771496.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL1700
69771496.transcript: Yeah, yeah. Get a good look.

70995565.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
70995565.transcript: It's almost over, guys! Hang in there!

71326327.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
71326327.transcript: Bring it. I'll take you all on.

90571439.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
90571439.transcript: Clever? Uh, just stabbed him a bunch.

95532346.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
95532346.transcript: Wait till I get my hands on him.

100907304.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
100907304.transcript: After you've slayed enough foes, you develop a certain rhythm.

106292888.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_2
106292888.transcript: Ha! Thought I was a goner!

110354518.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
110354518.transcript: Thanks? A compliment's a compliment, I guess.

112873811.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
112873811.transcript: Nice. We got this in the bag.

114218088.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
114218088.transcript: So the gloves are off, right? No more Miss Nice, Zeta.

114436224.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
114436224.transcript: Eyes on the prize, boys and girls.

114686696.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_recovery_C_PL1700
114686696.transcript: I was doing fine, but sure.

118198901.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1700_2
118198901.transcript: What the hell are you playing at?

123608602.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
123608602.transcript: These weirdos are pissing me off.

127601702.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
127601702.transcript: I knew you were good, but damn!

133086796.label: PL1600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
133086796.transcript: Bet you're glad I'm on your side.

137934662.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1700_3
137934662.transcript: Thanks for the assist. I owe ya.

141508976.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
141508976.transcript: Still got some fight left in you, right?

149826627.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
149826627.transcript: Let's find out how much armor this thing really has.

155419355.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
155419355.transcript: No way! I've been going full speed over here!

161682171.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_get_snp_1
161682171.transcript: You're officially under my protection now.

166693404.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
166693404.transcript: We can't rest easy just yet.

189051422.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
189051422.transcript: Man, this guy goes all battle crazy like Vassaraga.

193313050.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
193313050.transcript: Yes, Kat! That's what I'm talking about!

199432253.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
199432253.transcript: Big mistake, thinking you could bully us sky dwellers.

203765534.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
203765534.transcript: I'm going to shut that big yap of yours.

205320193.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
205320193.transcript: Guess you're not a normal dork after all.

214242257.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
214242257.transcript: So, we ready for the next one?

215569413.label: PL1600_vo_ETC_lockon_3
215569413.transcript: You want a piece of this?

219523576.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
219523576.transcript: Don't you dare steal my thunder, Galanza!

222361770.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
222361770.transcript: The skies are counting on us!

229237032.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
229237032.transcript: Stir up fire and you will be burned. What a nerd.

231369845.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
231369845.transcript: I know, Arves. Bear with me a little longer.

232006369.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
232006369.transcript: Got it. Stick close behind me.

239616402.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
239616402.transcript: Hey, no sweat. I always bring the pain.

252433892.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
252433892.transcript: Yeah, yeah. Vassarag always tells me the same thing.

259886276.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
259886276.transcript: Only if you bring the cover fire.

264507149.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
264507149.transcript: A wind primal, eh? No problem.

279568059.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
279568059.transcript: I think I caught a cold on that stupid mountain.

287959508.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
287959508.transcript: Oh, that looks expensive. I'm gonna wreck it!

297920332.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
297920332.transcript: Just wait. I've got more to show.

325381686.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
325381686.transcript: Your evil schemes end here, Lilith.

330117473.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
330117473.transcript: No wonder this guy became a legend!

335127072.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
335127072.transcript: And that's how you really use a spear.

347433555.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
347433555.transcript: Should be on its last legs.

351367834.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
351367834.transcript: There's nobody who can take me.

352451518.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
352451518.transcript: Plenty more where that came from.

352564256.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
352564256.transcript: Hell yes, Io. That was clutch.

362215328.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
362215328.transcript: Okay, you definitely need your ass kicked.

363470755.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
363470755.transcript: Piss off! We got a tower to climb!

366996203.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
366996203.transcript: You and me, Lizard Boy, mano y mano.

368302680.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
368302680.transcript: You handle the concentrating, I'll handle the strong arming.

372667221.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
372667221.transcript: I dare you to use your craziest technique.

374621956.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
374621956.transcript: Hell yeah, I'm all fired up!

381146877.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
381146877.transcript: Come on, you got more than that, don't you?

397465699.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
397465699.transcript: You ever get the feeling our fighting styles are super similar?

412002490.label: PL1600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
412002490.transcript: Hell yeah. Score one for us.

416379150.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
416379150.transcript: You better not cry after I break all your flimsy little toothpicks.

422387452.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
422387452.transcript: I swear I hit her. This is bull!

425134431.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
425134431.transcript: Well, well. Want to test your flame against mine?

433188863.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
433188863.transcript: I'll take that as a compliment, I guess.

434211704.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
434211704.transcript: If that's not a prize catch, then I don't know what is.

435461381.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
435461381.transcript: Not bad. Then this next one's gonna rock your mullet off.

436913302.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
436913302.transcript: Don't worry. I know how to handle it.

438260497.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
438260497.transcript: Damn it! Nothing works on this guy!

443397446.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
443397446.transcript: Hey! I think that did something!

444331814.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
444331814.transcript: Sheesh, you keep me on my toes.

445689329.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
445689329.transcript: Heads up, it's definitely not the same.

451643901.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
451643901.transcript: You should see me when I get serious.

455651219.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_enemy_crush_parts_1
455651219.transcript: You broke that sucker clean off!

465063362.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_1_FIRST
465063362.transcript: No way! He didn't even flinch!

465826081.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
465826081.transcript: There's way more where that came from.

476065247.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
476065247.transcript: Where is your damn weak spot?

481717898.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
481717898.transcript: Like spearing fish in a barrel.

482230230.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
482230230.transcript: We were just too hot to handle.

482951333.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
482951333.transcript: You're the strongest warrior in the skies? Wrong.

484147765.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
484147765.transcript: That shiny armor's not so shiny anymore, is it?

489896173.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
489896173.transcript: Ha! I sneeze harder than those winds.

494901024.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
494901024.transcript: Let's head to the top of the tower as fast as we can.

495204860.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_hp_down_reaction_1
495204860.transcript: Hang in there. Help is on the way.

495284044.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
495284044.transcript: You match my timing, you big oaf!

509882944.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
509882944.transcript: Needs spear. Shame I gotta snap it in half.

526597115.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
526597115.transcript: Fair enough. I was just getting bored.

527838126.label: PL1600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
527838126.transcript: Well, not bad for a day's work.

535190078.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
535190078.transcript: What's wrong with you people? Shoo!

536537622.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
536537622.transcript: Wow, you're a beast! I love it!

539154502.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
539154502.transcript: Don't worry, it's never going to point in your direction.

546065636.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
546065636.transcript: What's the plan for the next chunk?

552510935.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
552510935.transcript: Guys, I don't like what I'm seeing.

554611389.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
554611389.transcript: Obviously. You're not the only badass in this crew.

557649722.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
557649722.transcript: You work in teams often. It was a cinch following you.

558026882.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
558026882.transcript: Couldn't have done it without ya.

562192844.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL1700_2
562192844.transcript: You've been working on your timing.

564539374.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
564539374.transcript: You gotta know when to put up or shut up.

575756958.label: PL1600_vo_DMG_down_2
575756958.transcript: If I die now, it's all over.

591531943.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
591531943.transcript: This place gives me the creeps.

605589140.label: PL1600_vo_DMG_rise_3
605589140.transcript: We got a badass over here.

608334978.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
608334978.transcript: We'll tear it down if we keep chippin' away.

610842394.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
610842394.transcript: We're in the same crew. No thanks necessary.

611212780.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
611212780.transcript: Uh, where the heck is this coming from?

616621020.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
616621020.transcript: Ha! Just the way I like it.

626204383.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
626204383.transcript: Our vests can fry anything. Just watch.

627254370.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
627254370.transcript: Remind me to kick your ass later.

629098816.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
629098816.transcript: Oh, look, this loser came back for more humiliation.

640156795.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
640156795.transcript: We've come too far to go down in flames. Time to take a stand!

665526064.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
665526064.transcript: Yeah, well, seems I need to hit the racetrack.

669030120.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
669030120.transcript: Rosetta, you sure have a way with that whip.

679229806.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
679229806.transcript: Right? Stick with me and we can take on anything.

697138010.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
697138010.transcript: Hey, Knuckles. I want to see you go all out.

697691947.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
697691947.transcript: You're insane if you think I'm gonna retreat.

701754841.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
701754841.transcript: Is there anything you can't fix?

712436198.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
712436198.transcript: Naturally. Find their weak spot and it's over.

712695869.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
712695869.transcript: Now you'll get it every time.

721386601.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
721386601.transcript: Smash the core and we're home free!

746800265.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
746800265.transcript: I could do this in my sleep.

749468102.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
749468102.transcript: And together, they make one hell of an inferno.

765661020.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
765661020.transcript: Man, Roland, you made that a cinch.

770437734.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
770437734.transcript: Hell yeah! I love seeing your pack of ghosts!

778849664.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_A
778849664.transcript: Thanks! Thought I was a goner.

787759730.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1700_3
787759730.transcript: You can still die too, tough guy.

788228083.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
788228083.transcript: I did the heavy lifting, but yeah.

788911771.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
788911771.transcript: Come on, people. The fun's just getting started.

797510246.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
797510246.transcript: Seriously? If anything, I thought we could go harder.

798620422.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
798620422.transcript: Nice team up. Oh, you won.

809195245.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
809195245.transcript: Whoa, hard on yourself much? Are all dragon slayers this serious?

811904639.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
811904639.transcript: I hunt primals like you for breakfast.

815703713.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
815703713.transcript: Yeah, but Ares is no slouch either.

839909504.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
839909504.transcript: The hell's up with this dude?

845808087.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
845808087.transcript: That was perfect. Keep it up.

851223567.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
851223567.transcript: Oh, remind me not to mess with you.

869693811.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
869693811.transcript: Yay! Wait, we're in the middle of a fight!

875118637.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_buff_A
875118637.transcript: Now I can go full throttle.

880306175.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
880306175.transcript: Wait, he wasn't going serious on us before? What an ass.

894744992.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
894744992.transcript: When I get mad, I get stabby.

897959417.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
897959417.transcript: No one's going home till we find that catalyst.

910039579.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
910039579.transcript: Ha! Who designed these stupid things?

910076496.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL1700_1
910076496.transcript: Damn, you actually pulled it off.

910267269.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
910267269.transcript: Thanks. Coming from a rose, that means a lot.

911204566.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
911204566.transcript: I'll crack her defenses like an egg.

913441670.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
913441670.transcript: Keep it up, you guys! Looking good!

918511914.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
918511914.transcript: Aw, do you say that to all the spear gals?

928901998.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
928901998.transcript: Let's put this wolf in the ground.

933573649.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
933573649.transcript: I think I could take you in a race.

943707847.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
943707847.transcript: Hey, it's a two-pack of generals!

945332141.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
945332141.transcript: Damn, it's so hard to match your speed.

972735035.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
972735035.transcript: I'll burn them all to ash!

972804270.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
972804270.transcript: Haha, we are pros after all.

981674698.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
981674698.transcript: First the sucky weather, now ice monsters? Ugh.

990613345.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
990613345.transcript: Okay, I admit you do wield a pretty decent flame.

1001670026.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
1001670026.transcript: Then why do you look like you just saw a ghost?

1001833665.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_4
1001833665.transcript: They got a cheap shot on me.

1006865394.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
1006865394.transcript: Blow up already! I don't got all day!

1024370876.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
1024370876.transcript: Why? You want to find out?

1042126590.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
1042126590.transcript: Our vests can be unwieldy, but it comes through.

1043946473.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
1043946473.transcript: Where'd you learn to swing that sword?

1044181523.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
1044181523.transcript: I want to meet the idiot who thinks they can take us on.

1047439528.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1700
1047439528.transcript: This coming from you of all people.

1054721515.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
1054721515.transcript: You call that pain? I'll show you pain.

1064182059.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
1064182059.transcript: You really want to go, huh?

1071783523.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
1071783523.transcript: Out comes your lovable side again.

3030022.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
3030022.transcript: Uh-uh. Do your job, Mr. Eternal.

3410770.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
3410770.transcript: And I thought I hit hard and fast.

18711898.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
18711898.transcript: Yeah, yeah. Celebrate now while you can.

27546994.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
27546994.transcript: If you thought that was cool, you haven't seen anything yet.

28942406.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
28942406.transcript: I don't care if you're one of the six dragons. No one outdoes me.

69964324.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
69964324.transcript: Now that's what I call hunting.

76076893.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL2700
76076893.transcript: Not bad enough to stop me.

96345865.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
96345865.transcript: Come on, Seofon. Let's raise the stakes.

99632136.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
99632136.transcript: Easy enough. I'm used to working with big lugs.

135820782.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_PL2600_3
135820782.transcript: Come on, I'll get you up.

149781866.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
149781866.transcript: Haha, no way! You oughta be thanking me!

153570373.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL2600_2
153570373.transcript: I just can't take my eyes off you.

179390700.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2700
179390700.transcript: I'll think about it. Next time.

181480641.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
181480641.transcript: Sometimes I wish I didn't know you.

187619060.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
187619060.transcript: It's kind of sick when darkness and flame come together, don't you think?

190936124.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
190936124.transcript: Wait, so that attack wasn't even at full power? Damn!

203673780.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
203673780.transcript: Watch me really get to work.

224997070.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL2600_3
224997070.transcript: Now you got me fired up.

259466989.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_recovery_B_PL2700
259466989.transcript: Your eagle eyes never miss a thing.

261852555.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
261852555.transcript: Huh, that felt smooth like automatic.

295846957.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
295846957.transcript: Sure. No pro- oh, wait a minute. Do you collect spears, too?

319926991.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
319926991.transcript: Bet you anything I can match your speed.

336522878.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
336522878.transcript: I didn't even know Flemette could do that.

343722288.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_buff_F_PL2700
343722288.transcript: How many dives you want to see?

356772911.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
356772911.transcript: You got it. Our vest hasn't had enough fun yet.

392936572.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
392936572.transcript: Gee, leave some fun for the rest of us.

436334113.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
436334113.transcript: Come on, Id. I know you can do better than that.

476086906.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
476086906.transcript: Whoa, can you write that down so I can frame it?

517624209.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
517624209.transcript: Glad we're on the same page.

548828592.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
548828592.transcript: Nothing can beat two synchronized hunters.

551623573.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
551623573.transcript: Some of my best work yet.

554169074.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
554169074.transcript: Thanks. Flattery sustains me, by the way.

564905158.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL2600_2
564905158.transcript: Oh, guts and glory for you, huh?

568729074.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
568729074.transcript: You know me. Gonna show up and kick back.

577227909.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
577227909.transcript: Careful, B. Try to stick closer together.

580261688.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
580261688.transcript: Hey, I don't mind breaking a few thumbs.

581748347.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
581748347.transcript: Up for some healthy competition, Kat?

621245771.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
621245771.transcript: You never slow down, do ya?

622758395.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
622758395.transcript: And when they do, it'll be like stabbing fish in a barrel.

634712635.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_buff_D_PL2600
634712635.transcript: You want flashy? Coming right up!

651408896.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
651408896.transcript: No one else kicks like that. What's the trick?

660669950.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
660669950.transcript: Damn, V, you and M-Brass killed!

661454092.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
661454092.transcript: Yep, I'm not just a pretty face. Wait, how'd you know that?

669664754.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
669664754.transcript: How about a throwdown? Loser buys pancakes.

679873404.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
679873404.transcript: That was a beam of fire. From your fist?

683870373.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
683870373.transcript: Well, it's a good thing I don't.

693409446.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
693409446.transcript: Until only Ash remains. Ugh. We sound too much like Percival.

694742331.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
694742331.transcript: Dragon Slayer, such a badass nickname.

705912318.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL2600
705912318.transcript: Oh, hush. I'm just getting started.

717631979.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2700_2
717631979.transcript: What? So you can slip up?

734568954.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
734568954.transcript: Guess it's time I got serious.

739815325.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
739815325.transcript: Uh, who do you think you are?

743208346.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
743208346.transcript: I may like his brawn, but I've got style and wits.

749570170.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
749570170.transcript: Nice. Glad I make that impression.

756868070.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2700_3
756868070.transcript: Sorry. I should have kept him off you.

764268428.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
764268428.transcript: You think so? I'll tell him you said that.

766516448.label: PL1600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL2600_3
766516448.transcript: Sit back and patch yourself up, B.

804100164.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
804100164.transcript: How many times have I told you not to take my targets? Hello? Are you listening? I'm talking to you.

842227448.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
842227448.transcript: Certainly, madam. Let us go at your preferred pace.

853496648.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
853496648.transcript: Dang. Note to self, don't burn the roses.

866941715.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
866941715.transcript: I'll take that as a compliment.

906391422.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
906391422.transcript: Let's do this, Arvest! Full throttle!

917266761.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
917266761.transcript: No problem. You should be used to it by now.

934056453.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
934056453.transcript: And here I thought you let Id do all the hard work.

948373929.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
948373929.transcript: I'd say our vest does most of the work.

955376534.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
955376534.transcript: That power. You're really one of the dragons.

967654093.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
967654093.transcript: I'll take it from here. Why don't you grab a nap?

975640696.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
975640696.transcript: So you can make anything with alchemy.

999414456.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
999414456.transcript: Really did a number on him, didn't we?

1012018196.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
1012018196.transcript: Whoa! Pump the brakes! No way are we together!

1013637947.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
1013637947.transcript: Huh, you actually kept up with me.

1022290992.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
1022290992.transcript: Of course we kick ass. No one holds a candle to us.

1027340278.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0000
1027340278.transcript: Gotta hand it to you, Cap.

1068017522.label: PL1600_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL2700_2
1068017522.transcript: Just getting into the right headspace.

1069332761.label: PL1600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
1069332761.transcript: Just a bud, huh? I'll bloom for the next one.

83065113.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
83065113.transcript: We make a fine pair of hunters.

174499327.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
174499327.transcript: Okay, okay. You're coming on a little strong.

211294204.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
211294204.transcript: Hey, what do holy predators like to eat?

285340811.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
285340811.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

323618066.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_2
323618066.transcript: Here goes. No pain, no gain. No pain, no gain. No pain, no gain. Nice warm-up.

544738375.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
544738375.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

561523144.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_abs_3
561523144.transcript: In it to win it. Easy peasy. You got this. One more. Okay, that's enough.

576313912.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_abs_2
576313912.transcript: Yeah. Working that core. Yeah. Feeling the burn. Yeah. One more. Nice.

670541490.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
670541490.transcript: Damn, Seofon! You fight like a demon!

763595564.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
763595564.transcript: Thanks. Nice to feel appreciated around here.

783354821.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
783354821.transcript: Go time. One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six.

888191128.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
888191128.transcript: Ha ha! We burn those suckers!

917766454.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
917766454.transcript: Mess with the best, die like the rest.

998817655.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
998817655.transcript: Sure, but what about the wicked girl who wields it?

1000449062.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
1000449062.transcript: Does that mean I can turn up the heat?

255527960.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
255527960.transcript: We make a pretty good team.

379804756.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
379804756.transcript: Oh, I see why they call you the Supreme Primarch.

656111391.label: PL1600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
656111391.transcript: You should see me when I get pissed.

5545220.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
5545220.transcript: Come to momma. That hit the spot.

496558983.label: PL1600_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
496558983.transcript: My stomach is rumbling. Much better.
